text.title: AI Slop Detector Checklist Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the AI Slop Detector Checklist methodology. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Draft MUST contain ≥1 piece of original signal: a numeric claim sourced from operator's own data, a named anecdote, or a contrarian take with stake. Generic 'AI in 2026 is transforming X' does not count.

rationale.source: Google Search Quality guidelines + Helpful Content Update

rule.rationale: E-E-A-T (experience) requires evidence of first-hand authority; AI drafts default to surface-level survey.

rule.statement: Forbidden phrases (case-insensitive) include: 'it is important to note', 'in today's fast-paced world', 'in this article we will explore', 'in conclusion', 'let's dive into', 'unleash', 'leverage'. Auto-fail if >2 occurrences total.
rule.rationale: Hedging tics are AI-detection signal AND signal lack of voice.

rule.statement: Any numeric claim, named tool, or attributed quote MUST link to a source. Unsourced numbers auto-fail.
rule.rationale: Hallucinated numbers / quotes are the #1 AI-content failure mode.

rule.statement: SlopScore names a single owner (the editor accountable for ship/rework). 'team' / 'we' / '' are forbidden.
Verdict is binary: ship iff total_score ≥ 80/100. < 80 = rework. No 'soft' middle.
rule.rationale: Sliding scale invites rationalisation; a binary gate forces rework or accept.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent's context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-ai-slop-detector-checklist.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
